abstracts.abstract: Amend KRS 45.812 to require an agency, corporation, or school district that is authorized to issue a general obligation bond by an appropriation of the General Assembly, or by or on behalf of any Kentucky school district, to report the costs associated with the issuance of the bond to the Capital Projects and Bond Oversight Committee and the Interim Joint Committee on Appropriations and Revenue.

subject: Bonds, Public
Education, Finance
Fiscal Note
Reports Mandated
bill.title: AN ACT relating to economic development.
